theme.description: A dark, immersive environment that makes the colorful Pokemon cards pop. It uses 'Jewel & Luxury' principles with a deep obsidian base and subtle iridescent 'holographic' accents to mimic the feeling of rare trading cards. High-contrast data visualization ensures it functions perfectly as a collection manager.

rules: Use 'Outfit' for all headings to provide a premium, geometric tech feel.
Use 'Manrope' for body copy and data tables for maximum legibility.
Never use pure white for large blocks of text; use #A0A0AB for secondary information.
Overlines must be uppercase with wide letter spacing.
Every pixel must be utilized in the dashboard view.
Use 'h-full' on children to ensure they stretch to match their neighbors.

surfaces.usage: Sticky Headers, Floating Navs, Modal Overlays

surfaces.classes: bg-[#121218] border border-[#2D2D3B] hover:border-[#FF007F]/50 transition-colors duration-300

components.strategy: Shadcn UI Heavy + Custom Framer Motion
rules: Buttons: Use flat backgrounds with holographic gradient borders on hover.
Cards: Implement the 'Tall Card' trend. Allow vertical space for card artwork and price charts.
Charts: Use Shadcn Charts (Recharts). Lines should use accent colors (Cyan or Magenta) with a glowing drop shadow filter.
Forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, and Form components. Background #07070A, border #2D2D3B, focus ring should be primary accent.
Navigation: Glassmorphic sticky sidebar or top nav. Must always be visible on desktop.
Hover states on Pokemon cards should include a slight lift (-translate-y-2) and a 3D tilt effect if possible.
Use staggered entrance animations for lists and grid items.
Page transitions should be smooth fades with a slight upward drift (y: 20 -> 0).
Interactive elements must have clear focus states for accessibility.

icons.rules: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a premium, delicate look. Icon colors should generally match text colors, except for active states which should use primary/secondary accents.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark background with a subtle, elegant holographic foil texture.
hero_background.usage: Use as a full-screen background overlay with opacity-20 for the auth page or landing page hero section.

hero_foreground.description: Dark cinematic 3D render of floating blank trading cards in a void.
hero_foreground.usage: Use as the primary visual on the landing/auth page. Needs a gradient overlay to ensure text contrast.

collection_placeholder_1.description: A collection of Pokemon trading cards arranged on a blue couch.
collection_placeholder_1.usage: Use in the 'Share Collection' feature showcase or empty states.

collection_placeholder_2.description: A bunch of pokemon cards on a table.
collection_placeholder_2.usage: Use as a fallback image for user profiles or community shared collections.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='scan-card-button').
